Name: UArrowComponent
Description: A simple arrow rendered using lines. Useful for indicating which way an object is facing.

Variables.Name: bIsScreenSizeScaled
Variables.Description: Set to limit the screen size of this arrow

Variables.Name: ScreenSize
Variables.Description: The size on screen to limit this arrow to (in screen space)

Variables.Name: bTreatAsASprite
Variables.Description: If true, don't show the arrow when EngineShowFlags.BillboardSprites is disabled.

Functions.Name: SetArrowColor
Functions.Description: Updates the arrow's colour, and tells it to refresh
